Monday.description: What have you seen lately that has inspired you to do something?

Tuesday.description: Send in 'Would You Rather' questions, moral dilemmas, and other tough choices!

Wednesday.description: We want to hear your awkward stories that you wish someone else was there to witness.

Thursday.description: Give us your petty grievances. Complain about what you're going through. Share a story of perserverence.

Friday.description: Got an upcoming event? Something cool you want more people to know about? It's a community billboard segment, basically!
